sources.title: Side Street (RKO, 1929) CRIME DRAMA🍕FULL PRE-CODE MOVIE
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Presents CLASSIC MOVIE MONDAY
Stars: Tom Moore, Owen Moore, Matt Moore, and George Raft
Directed by: Malcolm St. Clair
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLmHgXUJMN1TUzR3YhpzxOuBM6YrZ91UVG
🍕 GEORGE RAFT'S EARLIEST CAMEO🍕 
From Radio Pictures and RKO Productions comes a big-city tale of three Irish brothers — one cop, one crook, and one caught in the crosshairs." 

The three brothers are portrayed by real-life siblings Tom Moore, Owen Moore, and Matt Moore, all well-known screen stars of the silent and early sound periods. Their dynamic performances give the story a sense of authenticity and emotional depth rarely seen in early talkies.

Adding to the film’s historical value is a brief appearance by George Raft in his earliest surviving film cameo. Long before he became a gangster film icon, Raft made his mark here, making this a must-watch for classic Hollywood fans and collectors alike.

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

Be sure to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more rare, vintage films every WEEK on PizzaFLIX.

This RKO release, directed by Malcolm St. Clair, is a hidden gem of Depression-era filmmaking, blending family loyalty, law enforcement, and urban crime into a tight, emotionally driven narrative.

Subscribe for more rare cinematic treasures restored for today’s audiences!

#SideStreet1929 #fullmovie #GeorgeRaft #RKO #ClassicMovies #RadioPictures#TomMoore #OwenMoore #MattMoore #MalcolmStClair #CrimeDrama #PreCodeHollywood #ClassicMovieMonday #PizzaFLIX

metadata.Plot: Joe Norson, a poor letter carrier with a sweet, pregnant wife, yields to momentary temptation and steals $30,000 belonging to a pair of ruthless blackmailers who won't stop at murder. After a few days of soul-searching, Joe offers to return the money, only to find that the "friend" he left it with has absconded. Now every move Joe makes plunges him deeper into trouble, as he's pursued and pursuing through the shadowy, sinister side of New York.
metadata.Actors: Farley Granger, Cathy O'Donnell, James Craig
